summary: React dashboard now presents OpenNori as a local observation surface: desktop and mobile pages show agent activity, current gap, need user, decision, Architecture Baseline, latest event, evidence health, and completion authority, with no browser console errors.
reviewability: Run npm run check; run node ./bin/opennori.js dashboard --root . --port 0 --no-open --json, open the URL, and compare output/playwright/opennori-dashboard-desktop.png plus output/playwright/opennori-dashboard-mobile.png. Playwright console reported Total messages: 0 (Errors: 0, Warnings: 0).
limitations: Dashboard is a read-only observation surface over /api/snapshot and /api/events; it does not replace status/report, evidence ledger, or completion authority. The visual check covered desktop 1440x980 and mobile 390x860.
